name: superdev
description: 18-skill toolkit + 54 specialized subagents for full-stack monorepo builds with a self-improving memory loop. Workspace-scope and package-manager agnostic (hooks auto-detect pnpm/npm/yarn/bun). v1.3.0 adds frontend-modular-architecture (opinionated structure: pages ≤ 100 lines, components ≤ 200 lines, dedicated Zustand stores per module, wizards split per-step, drawers/modals/popovers in parts/<name>/ folders with shadcn Portal primitives) and frontend-refactoring (atomic ONE-MODULE conversion in a single commit on a feature branch — deep plan, behavior baseline, atomic execute, zero-drift verify, hard rollback). v1.4.0–v1.6.0 add a Laravel backend option — laravel-enterprise-backend (Laravel 13 + PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB + database cache/sessions + SQS; Eloquent API Resources + hand-written TS contracts; #[Audit] attribute; Title-Case enums; Laravel Boost) and laravel-bref-deploy (AWS Lambda serverless via Bref 3.x), plus design-to-laravel (Claude Design → Laravel + Inertia 3 + React 19 monolith) — selectable via orchestrator backend- and frontend-stack gates. v1.7.0 makes completion ENFORCED, not advisory: a machine-checkable Definition-of-Done gate (done-gate.sh Stop hook + COMPLETION_LEDGER.json + the superdev-done skill) blocks any 'done' claim while typecheck/lint/build/integration/completeness/security/qa/brutal/readiness are red; the wave gate blocks lint errors + newly-introduced suppressions and is stack-aware (TS tsc/eslint + Laravel Pint/PHPStan/Pest); and the self-learning loop actually fires. v1.8.0 adds production-readiness-audit — an iterative loop that scores EVERY module 1–10 across five passes (completeness/wiring, data+seed, tenancy-isolation, exhaustive-Playwright every route/form/data-shape FE+BE, code-quality/security with zero suppressions) and loops fix→re-audit until every module is 9+, requiring real seed data + an initial owner/admin user, a tenancy-leak test, and writing gates.readiness + per-module readiness_score into the ledger (3 new agents: module-readiness-rater, tenancy-isolation-tester, seed-data-architect). Other skills: prd-design-build-orchestrator, design-to-nextjs, design-preservation, nestjs-enterprise-backend, security-review-and-fix, prototype-to-saas, exploratory-qa, systematic-debugging, product-completeness-audit, brutal-exhaustive-audit, superdev-self-learning.
